plans.title: Sync Contract Implementation
plans.notes: Merged to main. QC三审 APPROVE (10 blocking issues fixed). QA PASS (226/226 tests). 22 files changed, 4479 insertions. 2 commits + merge.

metadata.description: Implement sync mechanism (Command, DeltaBundle, Outbox) with bundle metadata fields, partial apply semantics, local precheck, and conflict resolution
metadata.task_modified_2: Task 3: Add bundle metadata fields (submitting_creator_id, manuscript_phase, output_manuscript)
metadata.tests: 70 nexus-sync tests, 226 workspace total — all passing
qc_fixed: SYNC-C2: Fragile conflict detection replaced with JSON parsing
SYNC-C3: Outbox write methods wrapped in transactions (append, stage, mark_failed)
SYNC-C4: cli-sync bundle schema delta required fields added
SYNC-C5: ConflictDetail parsing uses safe conversion
SYNC-H1: Unsafe unwrap replaced with expect()
SYNC-H2: ConflictResponse::from_json returns error on missing success field
SYNC-H3: Duplicate create detection only checks creates WITH target_id
SYNC-H4: mark_sent no longer allows failed→sent transition
SYNC-H5: Exponential backoff uses saturating arithmetic

plans.title: V1.1 Tech Debt Mitigation + Feature Gap Resolution
plans.notes: Wave 1 (P0) complete: DM-R5 resolved, 3 schemas created, QC APPROVE. Wave 2 (P1) planned.

metadata.description: Resolve CRITICAL contract drift (DM-R5), complete missing schemas (delta/workspace-binding/agent-profile), address 27 V1.1 residuals across ACP session/policy, Research extraction, Context Assembly, Multi-Creator governance, and reliability hardening

notes.message: Phase 0 plans execute on main branch for initialization. Phase 1+ plans require feature branches.
Phase 0 complete: monorepo-structure, json-schema-foundation, codegen-pipeline all done. 15 commits on main. Ready for Phase 1.
Phase 1 Wave 0-1.5 complete: Architecture review, domain-models implementation (15 aggregates, 133 tests), QC三审, Critical fixes (C-1, C-2) verified.
domain-models merged to main. Residual findings recorded for cli-daemon-foundation, sync-contract, acp-client, context-assembly, and domain-models (non-blocking QC items).

Phase 1 Wave 2 architecture review complete. cli-daemon-foundation and sync-contract plans expanded. CLI-R1..R4, SYNC-R1..R3 upgraded from 'defer' to 'resolve'. Implementation order: cli-daemon → sync-contract → acp-client → context-assembly.

Clarify phase complete. 4 future iteration points recorded as residual findings (CLI-R5..R8): Unix socket support, manuscript promote strict mode, manuscript verify content checks, research scan content extraction. Ready for implementation.

ACP Client tech spec refined by @architect. SDK choice: agent-client-protocol v0.10.4. 6 tasks defined with parallel execution plan. ACP-R1/R2 resolved, 9 new V1.1+ residuals (ACP-R3..R11) added. Plan status: InProgress.

ACP Client Integration merged to main. 29 files changed, 6,638 insertions, 6 commits + merge. QC三审 APPROVE (ACP-C1/C2/H1 fixed). QA CONDITIONAL PASS. 312+ tests passing. 19 residuals tracked for V1.1. Context Assembly plan unblocked.

Phase 1 complete (8/8 plans Done). Phase 1 architecture + product reviews completed. 36 arch findings, 37 feature analysis. P0 bug fixes in progress on fix/v1.0-p0-bugs. Pre-Phase 2 consolidated plan created (2026-04-06-pre-phase2.md) with 5 implementation plans (A-E). 5 Phase 2 plan entries added to status.json.
Cleaned up 7 stale residuals resolved by Plan A: CLI-R9..R14 (6 HIGH) closed, DEBT-X4 closed. CLI-R15 updated as partially resolved. Archived to archived/residuals/. Total open: 49 → 42.

V1.1 tech debt mitigation plan created (2026-04-08-v1.1-tech-debt-mitigation.md) based on architecture gap analysis. 3-wave approach: Wave 1 (P0 — DM-R5 + 3 schemas), Wave 2 (P1 — ACP/Research/Manuscript/Context), Wave 3 (P2 — DEBT-X/SYNC-R/FH-R). Total: 27 residuals + 3 missing features. nexus-platform Phase 2 confirmed complete.
DM-R5 resolved: MembershipRole enum aligned with v1-spec §5.4, §7 (Owner/Maintainer/Collaborator/OfficialCreator). Permission methods updated. Contracts regenerated. Total open residuals: 42 → 41.

V1.1 Wave 1 complete: DM-R5 resolved (MembershipRole aligned), 3 schemas created (delta/workspace-binding/agent-profile), W1-C1 fixed (AgentProfile enums), QC三审 APPROVE. 7 commits, 662 tests passing, 25 schemas valid. Ready for merge.
Wave 1 merged to main: DM-R5 resolved, 3 schemas created, W1-C1 fixed, QC APPROVE. 59 files, 4102 insertions. Ready for Wave 2.

CTX-R6 resolved: MemoryKind enum expanded from 4 to 8 variants matching schema (ADR-001). Added strum::Display, FromStr implementation. CLI commands updated to use enum. Total open residuals: 41 → 40.

2025-04-05-domain-models.title: Edge-case test coverage for Pairing and ForkBranch lifecycle
2025-04-05-domain-models.target: V1.1 — add boundary/edge-case tests for concurrent pairing conflicts, fork cycle detection

2025-04-05-domain-models.title: MembershipRole enum drift between schema and domain
2025-04-05-domain-models.target: V1.1 — align schema enum with domain MembershipRole or vice versa
2025-04-05-domain-models.closure_note: Fixed in feature/v1.1-tech-debt-mitigation: MembershipRole enum aligned with v1-spec §5.4, §7 (Owner/Maintainer/Collaborator/OfficialCreator). Permission methods updated. Contracts regenerated. All tests pass.

2025-04-05-cli-daemon-foundation.title: Local API Unix socket support for better IPC performance
2025-04-05-cli-daemon-foundation.scope: nexus42d Local API — currently HTTP over TCP loopback (port 8420); Unix socket provides better security and performance for local IPC
2025-04-05-cli-daemon-foundation.target: V1.1+ — add Unix socket support as optional transport; keep HTTP as default for V1.0

2025-04-05-cli-daemon-foundation.title: Manuscript promote precondition checks (strict mode)
2025-04-05-cli-daemon-foundation.scope: nexus42 manuscript promote — V1.0 uses loose constraints (user-initiated, no hard pre-checks); strict mode could enforce phase transitions (review→finalize), StoryManifest status, sync state
2025-04-05-cli-daemon-foundation.target: V1.1+ — add optional strict mode with `--strict` flag or workspace config

2025-04-05-cli-daemon-foundation.title: Manuscript verify content integrity checks
2025-04-05-cli-daemon-foundation.scope: nexus42 manuscript verify — V1.0 verifies metadata only; content integrity (comparing content_hash with actual file SHA256) deferred
2025-04-05-cli-daemon-foundation.target: V1.1+ — add `--check-content` flag to verify manuscript file integrity against StoryManifest.content_hash

2025-04-05-cli-daemon-foundation.title: Research scan content extraction for PDF and URL sources
2025-04-05-cli-daemon-foundation.scope: nexus42 research scan — V1.0 records metadata only (path, size, hash, title); PDF text extraction and URL content fetching deferred
2025-04-05-cli-daemon-foundation.target: V1.1+ — add `--extract-text` flag to enable content extraction for PDF and URL sources; may require external tools (pdftotext, http client)

2025-04-05-cli-daemon-foundation.title: No tracing in daemon API handlers
2025-04-05-cli-daemon-foundation.scope: crates/nexus42d/src/api/handlers/*.rs — HTTP handlers lack tracing/logging statements for request tracking and debugging
2025-04-05-cli-daemon-foundation.target: V1.1 — add tracing::info/debug statements to handlers for request lifecycle observability
2025-04-05-cli-daemon-foundation.notes: Partially resolved by Plan A Task 4 (middleware has tracing::debug). Individual handlers still lack tracing.

2025-04-05-sync-contract.title: Missing outbox transaction atomicity tests
2025-04-05-sync-contract.scope: crates/nexus-sync/src/outbox.rs — no tests for concurrent writes, rollback, crash recovery
2025-04-05-sync-contract.target: V1.1 — add concurrent append tests, transaction rollback tests

2025-04-05-sync-contract.title: No HTTP request body size limit on SyncClient
2025-04-05-sync-contract.scope: crates/nexus-sync/src/sync_client.rs — Client::builder() has no max body size
2025-04-05-sync-contract.target: V1.1 — add body_max_size to client builder

2025-04-05-sync-contract.title: No auth match validation in precheck
2025-04-05-sync-contract.scope: crates/nexus-sync/src/precheck.rs — submitting_creator_id not validated against authenticated identity
2025-04-05-sync-contract.target: Requires daemon context — add when daemon exposes authenticated creator info

2025-04-05-sync-contract.title: BundleBuilder missing monotonicity validation
2025-04-05-sync-contract.target: V1.1 — precheck already handles; add optional validate() to builder

2025-04-05-sync-contract.title: Schema allOf may not enforce constraints correctly
2025-04-05-sync-contract.target: V1.1 — verify codegen output; inline constraints if needed

2025-04-05-sync-contract.title: Outbox schema migration path not documented
2025-04-05-sync-contract.target: V1.1 — add schema_version column and migration strategy

2025-04-05-sync-contract.title: No retry logic based on retry_after field
2025-04-05-sync-contract.target: V1.1 — honor retry_after from conflict response

2025-04-05-sync-contract.title: Partial apply doesn't persist retry state
2025-04-05-sync-contract.target: V1.1 — persist partial apply state to outbox for retry

2025-04-05-sync-contract.title: AutoReject resolution safety mechanism
2025-04-05-sync-contract.target: V1.1 — add confirmation prompt for auto-reject in CLI

2025-04-05-acp-client.title: Permission policy engine (grant/deny UI)
2025-04-05-acp-client.scope: V1.0 auto-grants all permissions; need configurable policy
2025-04-05-acp-client.closure_note: Implemented permission policy engine with configurable grant/deny rules, interactive prompts, CLI commands (policy grant/deny/list), and PolicyAwareClientHandler. Tests: 12 new policy tests, all 195 nexus42 tests pass.

2025-04-05-context-assembly.title: Summary generator lacks file size limit
Path traversal not explicitly validated in scan_recursive
2025-04-05-context-assembly.target: V1.1 — scope is local manuscript dirs under user control

2025-04-05-context-assembly.title: CLI doesn't validate WorldId format at input
2025-04-05-context-assembly.target: V1.1 — add clap validator for wld_ prefix pattern

2025-04-05-context-assembly.title: UTF-8 truncation safety in opening excerpt
2025-04-05-context-assembly.target: V1.1 — is_char_boundary already checked; add multi-byte safety tests

2025-04-05-context-assembly.title: MemoryKind as String not enum
2025-04-05-context-assembly.target: V1.1 — extract MemoryKind enum matching schema
2025-04-05-context-assembly.closure_note: MemoryKind enum updated with 8 variants matching schema (story_summary, research_material, review_note, character_note, world_building, plot_outline, theme_analysis, custom). Added strum::Display for serialization, FromStr for parsing. CLI commands updated to use enum. 6 new tests for enum behavior.

2025-04-05-context-assembly.title: Missing file I/O edge case tests (permissions, symlinks)
2025-04-05-context-assembly.closure_note: Added 5 edge case tests: permission-denied file (scan and generate), symlink to file, symlink to directory, broken symlink. All tests use catch_unwind to verify no panics. Tests bundled into CTX-R2 commit (file size limit).

2026-04-06-foundation-hardening.title: Schema drift between CLI/daemon has no automated detection
2026-04-06-foundation-hardening.target: V1.1 — add CI drift-detection job comparing schema constants

2026-04-06-foundation-hardening.title: Pool timeout not explicitly configured (deadpool default 30s)
2026-04-06-foundation-hardening.target: V1.1 — add configurable timeout to DbPool::new()

2026-04-06-foundation-hardening.title: Error code inconsistency between error_code() and Internal code field
2026-04-06-foundation-hardening.target: V1.1 — document and standardize error code convention

2026-04-06-foundation-hardening.title: NexusApiError auth variants underspecified (only AuthRequired)
2026-04-06-foundation-hardening.target: Plan D (Auth Flow) will add auth-specific variants

2026-04-06-foundation-hardening.title: DbPool::status() method has no callers
2026-04-06-foundation-hardening.target: V1.1 — useful for future monitoring endpoint

2026-04-06-foundation-hardening.title: Test helper duplication across errors.rs and middleware.rs
2026-04-06-foundation-hardening.target: V1.1 — extract to shared test_utils module

2026-04-06-foundation-hardening.title: SQLite file locking not tested
2026-04-06-foundation-hardening.target: V1.1 — WAL mode mitigates; complex to test

2026-04-06-foundation-hardening.title: Race condition window between init_workspace and middleware
Pool size tuning undocumented
2026-04-06-foundation-hardening.target: V1.1 — add comment with tuning guidance

2026-04-06-foundation-hardening.title: Mutex poisoning uses .expect() — could crash daemon
Test file organization (large test modules in production files)
2026-04-06-foundation-hardening.target: V1.1 — split tests into separate files
